title: pleopeltis angustata
intro: Pleopeltis angustata, also known as the narrow-leaved polypody, is a species of epiphytic fern native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pleopeltis angustata include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and treat respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used to treat various ailments in folk medicine.
